## How to test

## Pre-PR gate

Run the checks from [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#before-you-open-a-pr)
and confirm they pass:

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` — types
- [ ] `npm run lint` — eslint
- [ ] `npm run build` — production build (the real gate)
